description: Windows desktop monitor for DeepSeek API balance and usage.
notes: Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime is required. Windows 11 usually includes it; Windows 10 may require a separate install.
The app stores API keys and usage tokens at %APPDATA%\DeepSeekMonitorWindows\config.json.
WebView2 login cache is stored at %LOCALAPPDATA%\com.deepseek.monitor.windows\EBWebView and is not managed by Scoop persist.
